privileged_info_summary: This task uses OpenBCI GUI v5.2.2 with a synthetic (algorithmic) session, not real EEG data. The Impedance widget (Cyton Signal Widget) is a verified real component of OpenBCI GUI that supports 8-channel impedance monitoring. Channels 1 and 2 are configured as active while channels 3-8 are inactive. The environment contains real EEG data from PhysioNet (eegmmidb S001), but this specific task does not use playback data. The task's expected output is a screenshot of the impedance widget configuration saved to /home/ga/Documents/OpenBCI_GUI/Screenshots/impedance_check.png.
